description_long: This is a small, single-story brick house with a simple rectangular layout and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in red brick with white mortar, giving it a classic urban appearance. One side features a large, white-framed window, while the adjacent wall includes a plain white door, suggesting the main entryway. The interior appears to be divided into at least two rooms, with visible shelving or storage units near the back. The roof is flat and unadorned, typical of modern or utilitarian urban structures. The overall design is minimalistic, with no decorative elements or landscaping visible.
description: A compact, single-story red brick house with a flat roof, large window, and a plain white door. The design is simple and functional, suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: This view shows a red brick wall with a large, white-framed window and a glimpse of interior shelving above the window.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main entryway with a plain white door next to the large window, both set in the red brick facade.
description_view_2: This angle displays a long, uninterrupted brick wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the house's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: This view presents the back of the house, featuring a continuous brick wall with no openings or architectural features.
attribute_entryway_design: Plain white door with no steps, porch, or decorative elements, directly set into the brick facade.
